name: wb-indicator-search

expect.error: query must be at least 2 characters
query must be at least 2 characters

_note: Free-text search of the full ~1,400-indicator World Bank catalog. Fuzz_cases land on PRE-NETWORK validation: too-short query, the query character guard (XSS rejected), and the fail-CLOSED numeric guard on 'limit' (poisoned -> ok:false invalid limit, never a clamped ok:true). NEVER no_db (no DB).
